suggestions.topic: Finalize repricing numbers for EIP-8038 and EIP-2780 ahead of devnet-7
suggestions.rationale: ACDE #240 deferred final confirmation pending full benchmark suite results. Devnet-7 launch targeting this week (July 9) requires stable numbers.
Target launch July 9 (this week). Need confirmation that all spec PRs merged, Alpha 12 released, and client branches ready.
Deferred from ACDE #239 with explicit expectation to present at next call. Presenter was absent June 18.

suggestions.topic: Review status of EIP-2780 intrinsic gas spec (PR #11844)
suggestions.rationale: Action assigned July 2 targeting ACDT review before this call. Need to confirm client consensus on Dragan's approach.
Proposal deadline set to August 6 (5 weeks out). With 13 EIPs proposed for Hegota since ACDE #237, core devs should begin discussing which 1-2 will be headliners.

suggestions.topic: Glamsterdam devnet-5 and devnet-6 status update
suggestions.rationale: Devnet-5 was at 95% participation June 18; devnet-6 targeted mid-June. Need confirmation both are stable or if issues blocking devnet-7.

suggestions.topic: EIP-8189 (Snap2 networking) inclusion decision for Glamsterdam or Hegota
suggestions.rationale: Proposed at ACDE #239 for inclusion in either fork. Geth, Besu, ethrex progressing. Needs formal stage decision.
Deferred from devnet-4 (ACDE #237) pending BAL Discord decision. No updates in subsequent calls; may have been resolved async.
